intro: Kailarsenia suffruticosa, also known as the 'Kailarsenia plant', is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in Ayurveda, to treat various health issues such as fever, respiratory problems, and digestive disorders due to its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The bioactive constituents of Kailarsenia suffruticosa include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
